prompt: Create a ParallelTypedEventBus for handling order update events concurrently. Set up multiple handlers that run in parallel when an order is placed - one for updating UI, one for persisting to storage, one for sending notifications. Show error handling with try-catch in handlers.
assertions: Has multiple handlers that execute concurrently (in parallel)
Handler for updating UI is included
Handler for persisting to storage is included
Handler for sending notifications is included
Demonstrates try-catch error handling in at least one handler
